title: Useful Resources
subtitle: A curated collection of tools, libraries, and references to help you build better web projects.

heroui.name: HeroUI
heroui.description: Beautiful, accessible React component library with dark mode, Tailwind integration, and 50+ ready-to-use components.

daisyui.name: DaisyUI
daisyui.description: The most popular Tailwind CSS component library. Adds semantic class names so you write less CSS and focus on structure.

uiverse.name: UIverse.io
uiverse.description: Open-source community of CSS & Tailwind UI elements. Browse thousands of free buttons, cards, loaders, and more.

21st-dev.name: 21st.dev
21st-dev.description: Open-source marketplace for React components — browse, preview, and copy production-ready UI components built by the community.

shadcn.name: shadcn/ui
shadcn.description: Copy-paste React components built with Radix UI and Tailwind CSS — own the code, no package dependency, fully customizable.

lucide.name: Lucide
lucide.description: Beautiful, consistent open-source icon library with 1500+ SVG icons — available as React components, Vue, and plain SVG.

aceternity.name: Aceternity UI
aceternity.description: Stunning animated React & Tailwind components. Parallax cards, text effects, gradients, and scroll-based animations.

magicui.name: Magic UI
magicui.description: 150+ free animated React components. Border beams, shimmer effects, and attention-grabbing micro-interactions.

hover-dev.name: Hover.dev
hover-dev.description: Interactive hover animations and motion effects for React. Ready-to-paste components with spring physics.

cssreference.name: CSS Reference
cssreference.description: Visual CSS reference guide — every property explained with live examples, syntax, and browser support at a glance.

htmlreference.name: HTML Reference
htmlreference.description: Visual HTML reference — every element and attribute documented with code examples and browser compatibility notes.

animejs.name: Anime.js
animejs.description: Lightweight JavaScript animation library. Animate CSS properties, SVGs, DOM attributes, and JS objects with a clean API.

motion.name: Motion
motion.description: The web animation library behind Framer Motion — production-ready gestures, transitions, and scroll animations for React and vanilla JS.

gsap.name: GSAP
gsap.description: Industry-standard JavaScript animation library — the most robust timeline-based animation toolkit, used on millions of websites.

rive.name: Rive
rive.description: Design and ship interactive animations in real time — state machines, game-quality graphics, and tiny file sizes for any platform.

paperanimator.name: Paper Animator
paperanimator.description: Create scroll-driven and timeline animations visually in the browser — export clean CSS and JS code ready to paste.

jitter.name: Jitter
jitter.description: Motion design tool for the web — create animated UI components, onboarding flows, and micro-interactions and export as video or Lottie.

sketch-meta.name: Sketch Animator
sketch-meta.description: Meta's AI tool that brings hand-drawn sketches to life — upload a figure drawing and watch it move with pose animation.

unicorn-studio.name: Unicorn Studio
unicorn-studio.description: Browser-based creative canvas for building immersive, interactive web experiences with real-time rendering and no-code animations.

framer.name: Framer
framer.description: Design and publish interactive websites directly. Prototyping meets production-ready site builder with CMS and animations.

kittl.name: Kittl
kittl.description: AI-powered graphic design platform for logos, labels, posters, and print assets — vector export, no design skills required.

pacdora.name: Pacdora
pacdora.description: Online packaging design tool — create 3D product mockups and structural dielines without Illustrator or Photoshop.

pngimg.name: PNGimg
pngimg.description: Huge library of free PNG images with transparent backgrounds — perfect for mockups, presentations, and UI composition.

svgrepo.name: SVG Repo
svgrepo.description: Browse and download 500,000+ open-licensed SVG vectors and icons — search, customize colors, and copy inline SVG instantly.

spline.name: Spline
spline.description: Browser-based 3D design tool — create interactive 3D scenes, objects, and animations and embed them directly into websites.

slideteam.name: SlideTeam
slideteam.description: Huge library of professionally designed PowerPoint and Google Slides templates — ready-made decks for any presentation.

3dlogolab.name: 3D Logo Lab
3dlogolab.description: Generate stunning 3D logos directly in the browser — customize materials, lighting, and export high-res renders for free.

napkin-ai.name: Napkin AI
napkin-ai.description: Turn text into clean diagrams, flowcharts, and visual concepts automatically — ideal for explaining technical ideas.

dora-run.name: Dora
dora-run.description: AI-powered no-code website builder with 3D scenes, scroll animations, and cinematic interactions — no coding needed.

meshy-ai.name: Meshy
meshy-ai.description: Generate and texture 3D models from text prompts or images with AI — export glTF, OBJ, FBX for web and game use.

krea-ai.name: Krea AI
krea-ai.description: Real-time AI image generation and creative asset creation — generate, enhance, and iterate on visuals instantly.

autodraw.name: AutoDraw
autodraw.description: Google's AI drawing tool — sketch anything rough and it guesses what you meant, turning doodles into clean icons instantly.

klingai.name: Kling AI
klingai.description: State-of-the-art AI video generation — create cinematic clips from text or image prompts with realistic motion and physics.

imagine-explainers.name: Imagine Explainers
imagine-explainers.description: AI-powered explainer video creation — turn concepts, scripts, or prompts into animated explainer videos for any topic.

recraft.name: Recraft
recraft.description: AI design tool specialized in vectors, icons, and brand illustrations — generate consistent visual styles across an entire project.

faces-app.name: Faces.app
faces-app.description: AI-powered face and avatar generator — create realistic portraits, age progressions, and stylized faces for any creative project.

reactbits.name: ReactBits
reactbits.description: Animated React component library with creative UI patterns — backgrounds, text effects, and interactive components.

v0.name: v0 by Vercel
v0.description: AI-powered UI generator by Vercel. Describe a component in plain English and get production-ready React + Tailwind code instantly.

webcode-tools.name: WebCode.tools
webcode-tools.description: Collection of handy web code generators. Quickly create CSS gradients, shadows, flexbox layouts, meta tags, and more.

tooooools.name: Tooooools
tooooools.description: Curated collection of micro web tools for developers and designers — quick generators, converters, and utilities.

10015.name: 10015.io
10015.description: All-in-one tools hub with 100+ web utilities — text processing, code formatters, image tools, color pickers, and more.

seostudio.name: SEO Studio
seostudio.description: Free SEO audit and analysis toolkit — meta tag generators, keyword tools, and page-speed insights in one place.

formia.name: Formia
formia.description: Beautiful, interactive form builder with conversational flow, animations, and embeddable forms — no backend needed.

astro.name: Astro
astro.description: The web framework for content-driven websites — ship zero JavaScript by default, use any UI framework, and get blazing-fast performance.

vite.name: Vite
vite.description: Lightning-fast frontend build tool — instant server start, HMR, and optimized production builds for any modern JS framework.

meta-ai.name: Meta AI
meta-ai.description: Meta's AI research and product hub — access Llama models, image generation, and the latest open-source AI tools from Meta.
